headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income
summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

raw.headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.

headline: Did Genuine Parts' NAPA–Motion Split and Dividend Hike Just Recast GPC's Investment Narrative?
summary: In February 2026, Genuine Parts Company reported fourth-quarter 2025 sales of US$6,009.42 million but moved from net income to a net loss, while also outlining 2026 guidance, reaffirming robust M&A plans of US$300 million to US$350 million and approving a 3.2% increase to its long-running quarterly dividend. On the same day, Genuine Parts also announced a planned separation of its NAPA automotive and Motion industrial businesses by early 2027, a move that, alongside analyst upgrades, is...
